target: PDF Worksheet Generator with GPT-4o exercises (6 activity types) and cumulative review
summary: ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All PDF buttons and regression tests confirmed.

FEATURE_1_WORKSHEET_CURRENT_MODE.evidence: Backend test passed - returns vocabulary_section, grammar_section, mixed_review with items
FEATURE_1_WORKSHEET_CURRENT_MODE.api_response: word_count:5, vocab_matching:5, fill_blank:5, true_false:5, grammar_reorder:5, correct_mistake:5, complete_pattern:5, mixed_review:5

FEATURE_2_WORKSHEET_CUMULATIVE_MODE.evidence: Backend test passed - word_count:20 (limited from 69 available), total_lessons:24
FEATURE_2_WORKSHEET_CUMULATIVE_MODE.api_response: Cumulative mode correctly limits to 20 words from 24 lessons

FEATURE_3_VOCAB_SECTION_ACTIVITIES.description: vocabulary_section contains matching, fill_blank, true_false items
FEATURE_3_VOCAB_SECTION_ACTIVITIES.evidence: test_current_worksheet_vocabulary_section_has_items PASSED - all 3 activity types have items

FEATURE_4_GRAMMAR_SECTION_ACTIVITIES.description: grammar_section contains reorder, correct_mistake, complete_pattern items
FEATURE_4_GRAMMAR_SECTION_ACTIVITIES.evidence: test_current_worksheet_grammar_section_has_items PASSED - all 3 activity types have items

FEATURE_6_CUMULATIVE_VOCAB_ENDPOINT.description: GET /api/unified/cumulative-vocab/stage_1_unit_06_lesson_04?max_words=20 returns max 20 words from 24 lessons
FEATURE_6_CUMULATIVE_VOCAB_ENDPOINT.evidence: Backend test passed - total_lessons:24, total_vocab_available:69, selected_count:20

FEATURE_7_CACHING.description: Second call to same worksheet returns instantly from cache
FEATURE_7_CACHING.evidence: test_cached_response_is_instant PASSED - both calls under 2s with identical MD5 hashes

FEATURE_8_PDF_BUTTONS_IN_REVIEW.description: Frontend Review section shows 'This Lesson' and 'All Lessons (Cumulative)' download buttons
FEATURE_8_PDF_BUTTONS_IN_REVIEW.evidence: Playwright found both buttons in Review activity - screenshot 15_review_activity.png

FEATURE_9_WARMUP_3_QUESTIONS_REGRESSION.evidence: UI screenshot shows '1 / 3' counter in Warm-up activity - screenshot 16_warmup.png

FEATURE_10_EXIT_QUIZ_5_QUESTIONS_REGRESS.evidence: UI screenshot shows '1 / 5' counter in Exit Quiz activity - screenshot 17_exit_quiz.png

frontend_ui_verification.lesson_roadmap: VERIFIED - Shows Vocabulary, Practice, Lesson, Skills, Review steps
frontend_ui_verification.pdf_this_lesson_button: VERIFIED - 'This Lesson' button visible in Review section
frontend_ui_verification.pdf_cumulative_button: VERIFIED - 'All Lessons (Cumulative)' button visible in Review section

critical_code_review_comments: worksheet_routes.py correctly uses GPT-4o for exercise generation with proper fallback to local generation
Caching works via MD5 hash of lesson_id+mode stored in /app/backend/content/worksheets/
Cumulative mode correctly calculates lesson_ids from unit/lesson numbers and limits words to max_words
Frontend buildPDFContent() and generatePDF() functions handle both current and cumulative modes
seed_data_creation: None required - existing curriculum content used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified PDF worksheet generator with GPT-4o. Key endpoints: GET /api/worksheet/generate/{lesson_id}?mode=current|cumulative&max_words=20 and GET /api/unified/cumulative-vocab/{lesson_id}?max_words=20. Cache files stored in /app/backend/content/worksheets/. Frontend PDF buttons are in Review activity at end of lesson sidebar. Warm-up has 3 questions (1/3), Exit Quiz has 5 questions (1/5) - both regression tests passed.
